description.en: Customer-facing factor, noncustomer insight, or industry assumption.
description.zh: 客户能感知的因子、非顾客洞察或行业假设。

description.en: Eliminate, Reduce, Raise, or Create rationale tied to a factor.
description.zh: 围绕某个因子的剔除、减少、提升或创造理由。

description.en: Observed customer behavior or case evidence supporting the curve.
description.zh: 支撑曲线的客户行为或案例证据。

description.en: Cost, adoption, or imitation risk created by the new value curve.
description.zh: 新价值曲线带来的成本、采用或模仿风险。

business-model-canvas.en: Take the differentiated value curve back into BMC's Value Propositions and Customer Segments — the whole model usually shifts.
business-model-canvas.zh: 把差异化后的价值曲线带回 BMC 的价值主张和客户细分 —— 整个模型通常都会跟着改。

value-proposition-canvas.en: ERIC moves (Eliminate / Reduce / Raise / Create) translate directly into VPC's Pain Relievers and Gain Creators.
value-proposition-canvas.zh: ERIC 动作(剔除 / 减少 / 提升 / 创造)直接对应 VPC 的痛点缓解和收益创造。

headline.en: See strategy as a value curve, not a slogan
headline.zh: 把战略看成价值曲线，而不是一句口号

whyOpen.en: Use this when competitors all sound similar. Plot what each player over-invests and under-invests in, then look for a different curve.
whyOpen.zh: 当竞争者听起来都差不多时用它：把每家公司在哪些因子上高投入、低投入画出来，再寻找不同的价值曲线。

audience.en: Teams comparing offerings, pricing, channels, experience, or category boundaries.
audience.zh: 适合比较产品、价格、渠道、体验或品类边界的团队。

firstSteps.en: List factors customers actually compare, not internal feature names.
firstSteps.zh: 列客户真正会比较的因子，而不是内部功能名称。

firstSteps.en: Draw current competitors before inventing your own curve.
firstSteps.zh: 先画出现有竞争者，再设计自己的曲线。

outcomes.en: A current-state value curve, one proposed to-be curve, and the ERIC moves that explain the difference.
outcomes.zh: 一条当前价值曲线、一条拟议未来曲线，以及解释差异的 ERIC 动作。

commonMisreads.en: Blue ocean is not simply being premium or cheap; it is changing which factors matter.
commonMisreads.zh: 蓝海不是单纯做高端或便宜，而是改变哪些竞争因子重要。

practicePrompts.en: Which factor could you eliminate because customers only tolerate it as an industry habit?
practicePrompts.zh: 哪一个行业惯例只是客户被迫接受，其实可以被剔除？
